alkylation reagent: reduction and alkylation with DTT and iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: samples were digested overnight with trypsin
enrichment method: to improve valency for pull-down and to avoid non-specific binding with secondary antibodies
fragmentation method: using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) for ions with charges 2–8
instrument: analyzed using a QExactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduction and alkylation with DTT and iodoacetamide
